name: WPO Toolkit Helper — The OSM Center
author: WPO Toolkit

sections.description:
WPO Toolkit Helper a medida para The OSM Center. 12 fixes activos basados en último wp-audit (2026-04-28T11-52-21-wp-audit).

Fixes activos

  • 01-listing-images-priority
  • 02-slider-aspect-ratio
  • 03-archive-min-height
  • 04-archive-observer
  • 05-block-users-rest
  • 06-robots-sitemap
  • 07-remove-localbusiness-schema
  • 08-conditional-directorist-assets
  • 09-ad-slot-reservation
  • 10-preload-lcp-thumbnail
  • 11-block-bot-paths
  • 12-adsense-preconnects

Plugins detectados en el audit

directorist, host-analyticsjs-local, ninja-forms, one-user-avatar, osm-directorist-cls-security-fix-v1-7, perfmatters, redirection, redis-cache, seo-by-rank-math, wp-rocket, wp-rocket-smart-preload
